event_title: [sfscala.org] By the Bay End of Year Party with Bill Venners, Essence of Testing
title: By the Bay End of Year Party with Bill Venners, Essence of Testing
description: The By the Bay meetup family plans a final joint gathering of the year! Note: AI.vision (http://ai.vision/), self.driving.cars (http://self.driving.cars/) and oh.hai.ai (http://oh.hai.ai/) Early Birds also end with the year on 12/31. Bill Venners will talk about The Essence of Testing. Clara will do a short talk about what they do! Single sign-up at sfscala.org (http://sfscala.org/). The space is limited so only sign up if you can attend! https://www.meetup.com/SF-Scala/events/236052360/
